changelog:
Expose persisted per-account success and failure counters in the account list and detail views while retaining the legacy requestCount/errorCount API fields. Global cards now clearly label total successful and failed client requests. Reset Statistics now clears both global and every account's cumulative counters.
账号列表和详情现在明确显示每个账号的成功次数与失败次数，并继续保留旧的 requestCount/errorCount API 字段兼容。顶部统计明确显示总成功次数和总失败次数；重置统计会同时清空全局及所有账号累计计数。
